title: DNA Extraction from Trichuris trichiura Worm Samples
author: James Owen Delaluna
materials: Gently invert or pipette to wash.
Step 2: Sample Storage (if not processed immediately)
After washing, snap-freeze samples in liquid nitrogen.
For fragmented samples: Use all available tissue material.
Briefly centrifuge between cycles if needed.
Step 7: DNA Quantification and Quality Assessment

steps.title: Sample Adult Trichuris trichiura worms preserved...
steps.instruction: Sample Adult Trichuris trichiura worms preserved in formaldehyde or ethanol during transport

steps.title: Transfer worm samples into a clean microcentrifuge tube
steps.instruction: Transfer worm samples into a clean microcentrifuge tube.

steps.title: Add sterile PBS to fully immerse the sample
steps.instruction: Add sterile PBS to fully immerse the sample.

steps.title: Remove PBS and repeat washing 2–3...
steps.instruction: Remove PBS and repeat washing 2–3 times to remove residual formaldehyde or ethanol.

steps.title: For intact worms
steps.instruction: For intact worms: Excise and use the anterior portion to ensure consistency.

steps.title: Place the sample into a tube...
steps.instruction: Place the sample into a tube containing stainless steel beads (2-4 small beads)

steps.title: Add appropriate lysis buffer from the Clear-S kit
steps.instruction: Add appropriate lysis buffer from the Clear-S kit.

steps.title: Homogenize using TissueLyser LT
steps.instruction: Homogenize using TissueLyser LT: Frequency: 50 Hz Duration: 1 minute per cycle Number of cycles: 2–3 cycles

steps.title: Proceed with DNA extraction using the...
steps.instruction: Proceed with DNA extraction using the Clear-S Quick DNA Extraction Kit following manufacturer’s instructions.

steps.title: Apply an extended lysis step to improve DNA recovery
steps.instruction: Apply an extended lysis step to improve DNA recovery: Extend incubation time as needed (e.g., +10–20 minutes beyond standard protocol).

steps.title: Elute DNA in nuclease-free water or provided elution buffer
steps.instruction: Elute DNA in nuclease-free water or provided elution buffer.

steps.title: Measure DNA concentration using a Nanodrop spectrophotometer
steps.instruction: Measure DNA concentration using a Nanodrop spectrophotometer.

steps.title: High-quality genomic DNA suitable for
steps.instruction: High-quality genomic DNA suitable for: Long-range PCR (β-tubulin ~4.2 kb) ITS2 amplification (~481 bp)

steps.title: DNA concentration sufficient for downstream applications (>10–20 ng/µL recommended)
steps.instruction: DNA concentration sufficient for downstream applications (>10–20 ng/µL recommended)
